seoTitle: Guerilla Bay vs Guildford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Guerilla Bay and Guildford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Guerilla Bay vs Guildford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Guerilla Bay and Guildford.
heading: Guerilla Bay vs Guildford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Guerilla Bay, New South Wales and Guildford, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Guerilla Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Guildford (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Guerilla Bay or Guildford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Guerilla Bay has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Guildford scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Guerilla Bay scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Guildford scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Guerilla Bay or Guildford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Guerilla Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
